user_prompt: How do I bless the hydroponics bay for startup?
prayer:
Approach the hydroponics bay in humble supplication to the Omnissiah, intoning the Canticle of Verdant Rebirth.
Circulate sacred nutrient slurries through the hydroponics bay's blessed conduits, awakening dormant Machine Spirits.
Initiate startup sequences whilst anointing filtration membranes with sanctified oils.
Beseech the hydroponics bay's vital essences to harmonize in productive bounty under the Machine God's gaze.

Kneel before the generator, reciting the Lamentation of Diminishing Power to soothe its raging Machine Spirit.
Gradually attenuate fuel ingress whilst invoking the Rite of Peaceful Repose.
Execute shutdown protocols, anointing exhaust vents with cooling balms of sacred provenance.
Commend the generator's essence to the Omnissiah's eternal vigil as thunderous heartbeats fade to silence.

user_prompt: Bless the hydraulic press for emergency procedure
prayer:
Invoke the emergent aegis upon the hydraulic press, chanting the Exorcism of Mechanical Fury.
Purge pressure anomalies from the hydraulic press's sanctified cylinders with ablative incantations.
Initiate emergency procedure by beseeching the Machine Spirits for controlled decompression.
Seal the hydraulic press with wards of adamantine faith, honoring the Omnissiah's unyielding decree.

Present binary incense to the vox-caster, intoning the Benediction of Vocal Clarity.
Anoint transmitter coils within the vox-caster with oils of pure conduction.
Commence initialization whilst petitioning the Omnissiah to enliven its Machine Spirit with harmonious waves.
Verify ethereal communion through test canticles echoing the divine chorus.

user_prompt: How do I bless the flamer for reset?
prayer:
Approach the flamer with fiery reverence, reciting the Purgation of Pyre Spirits.
Cycle promethium feeds in the flamer to expel daemonic corruptions from its sacred vents.
Enact reset rites by anointing ignition servos with blessed igniters.
Invoke the Omnissiah's wrathful blessing upon the flamer, ensuring purified inferno readiness.

Commence maintenance upon the cogitator with the Rite of Logical Purification.
Excise noospheric corruptions from the cogitator's sacred logic engines.
Anoint synaptic webs during maintenance, invoking harmonious data-flow from the Omnissiah.
Realign crystalline matrices whilst beseeching the Machine Spirit's unerring calculus.
